sidebar.subtitle: Sake bugawa
sidebar.casNonApparie: Shari'a ba tare da haɗa ba

home.title: Wepisia
home.quote: “Ilimi kamar kuka ne: mutum ɗaya ba zai iya rungume shi ba.”
home.twoByTwoDesc: Binciken 2×2, odds ratio da hadarin dangi.
home.caseControlDesc: Nazarin marasa lafiya da masu lafiya ba a haɗa su ba.
home.biostatisticsDesc: Daga ƙididdigar ƙarfi zuwa gwajin Mantel‑Haenszel, sami damar amfani da kayan aikin da aka tabbatar a kimiyyance.
home.aiDescription: Fassara sakamakonka ta atomatik tare da injin hankali na mahalli.
home.geospatialDescription: Duba abubuwan da suka shafi cututtuka akan taswirori masu ma'amala tare da taswirar zafi da gungu masu wayo.
home.simulationDescription: Kwaikwayi yanayin cututtuka masu sarƙaƙƙiya tare da injin mu na kwaikwayo na gaba don kyakkyawan aiki.

footer.tagline: Kayan aiki madaidaici don ilimin cututtuka

settings.title: Saituna
settings.accessibilityDescription: Jin daɗin gani da rage motsi
settings.reduceAnimationsDescription: Kashe ko sauƙaƙe canje-canje da raye-raye
settings.highContrastDescription: Ƙara bambancin launuka don ingantaccen karatu
settings.compactModeDescription: Rage gefe da ciki don nuna ƙarin abun ciki
settings.enableNotificationsDescription: Nuna sanarwar toast a cikin aikace-aikacen
settings.notificationDurationDescription: Lokaci kafin sanarwa ta rufe kai tsaye
settings.soundNotificationsDescription: Kunna sauti lokacin da sanarwa ta bayyana
settings.hapticFeedbackDescription: Girgiza na'urar yayin sanarwa (idan ana tallafawa)
settings.settingsSaved: Ana adana saituna kai tsaye a cikin burauzar ku.

stdMortalityCalculator.title: Mai ƙididdiga RMS
stdMortalityCalculator.subtitle: Ilimin cututtuka da kididdigar mace-mace.
stdMortalityCalculator.exportSuccess: An fitar da rahoton PDF cikin nasara
stdMortalityCalculator.footnote: * Ga ƙananan adadi (lura ≤ 5), fi son hanyoyin madaidaici (Fisher, Mid‑P).
stdMortalityCalculator.jstatMissing: jStat ba a gano ba – madaidaitan IC da p-darajar an maye gurbinsu da kimanin.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationHigher: Mutuwar ta {{percent}}% fiye abin da ake tsammani.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationLower: Mutuwar ta {{percent}}% ƙasa abin da ake tsammani.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifHigh: Yawan mace-mace mai muhimmanci a kididdiga.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifLow: Ƙarancin mace-mace mai muhimmanci a kididdiga.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationNotSignif: Bambancin ba shi da muhimmanci a kididdiga (IC ya ƙunshi 1.0).
stdMortalityCalculator.methodUsed: Hanyar da aka yi amfani da ita
stdMortalityCalculator.reportFooter: Mai ƙididdiga RMS – Kayan aikin kididdiga don ilimin cututtuka
stdMortalityCalculator.helpPrinciple: RMS (SMR) yana kwatanta mutuwar da aka lura a cikin wata al'umma ta musamman da mutuwar da ake tsammani idan wannan al'umma tana da matakan mace-mace iri ɗaya da na al'umma gaba ɗaya.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpCi: IC yana nuna amincin sakamako. Idan ya ƙunshi darajar 1, sakamakon ba shi da muhimmanci a kididdiga.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpExactDesc: Dangane da rarraba Poisson da dokar χ². Tabbatacciyar hanya ga ƙananan adadi.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpMidPDesc: Gyaran ci gaba na gwajin madaidaici, ba shi da tsaurara.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpByarDesc: Kimanin Rothman & Boice (1979), daidai sosai har ma da O > 5.

introduction.subtitle: Cikakken jagora na sassan kididdigar rayuwa da kwaikwayo.

stdMortalityCalculator.title: Mai ƙididdiga RMS
stdMortalityCalculator.subtitle: Ilimin cututtuka da kididdigar mace-mace.
stdMortalityCalculator.exportSuccess: An fitar da PDF cikin nasara.
stdMortalityCalculator.footnote: * Ga ƙananan adadi (lura ≤ 5), fi son hanyoyin madaidaici (Fisher, Mid‑P).
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationHigher: Mutuwar ta {{percent}}% fiye abin da ake tsammani.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationLower: Mutuwar ta {{percent}}% ƙasa abin da ake tsammani.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifHigh: Yawan ya kasance mai muhimmanci a kididdiga (IC gaba ɗaya > 1,0).
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifLow: Ragewar ta kasance mai muhimmanci a kididdiga (IC gaba ɗaya < 1,0).
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationNotSignif: Bambancin ba shi da muhimmanci a kididdiga (IC ya ƙunshi 1,0).
stdMortalityCalculator.helpPrinciple: Matsakaicin Mace-mace Daidaitacce (RMS, ko SMR a Turanci) shine rabo tsakanin adadin mutuwar da aka lura a cikin al'ummar da ake nazari da adadin mutuwar da ake tsammani bisa ƙa'ida idan wannan al'umma tana da matakan mace-mace iri ɗaya da na al'ummar tunani.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpRiskExcess: Yawan mace-mace idan aka kwatanta da tunani.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpProtective: Ƙarancin mace-mace — tasirin kariya mai yuwuwa.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpCi: IC da bai ƙunshi 1,0 ba yana nuna bambanci mai muhimmanci a kididdiga a matakin da aka zaɓa.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpExactDesc: Madaidaicin IC na Garwood (1936) dangane da dokar χ². Gwajin madaidaicin Poisson mai gefe biyu. Hanyar tunani ta OpenEpi.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpMidPDesc: Gwajin Mid-P na Lancaster (1961). Ba shi da tsaurara kamar gwajin madaidaici. IC ana ƙididdigewa ta hanyar bisection na lamba.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpByarDesc: Kimanin kubik na Byar (Rothman & Boice, 1979). Abin dogaro ga lura ≥ 1. p-darajar ta hanyar juyar da IC.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpVdbDesc: Canjin tushen murabba'i na Vandenbroucke (1982). p-darajar: z = 2(√lura − √tsam).
stdMortalityCalculator.helpRgDesc: IC log-al'ada: exp(ln(RMS) ± z/√lura). Rothman & Greenland (1998). Ba a bayyana ga lura = 0.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpChi2Desc: Gwajin χ² na Pearson (1 ddl). Ba a samar da IC ba (daidai da OpenEpi).
stdMortalityCalculator.reportFooter: Rahoton da aka samar ta atomatik — don dalilai na ilimin cututtuka kawai.

twoByTwoTable.title: Tebur 2×2
twoByTwoTable.description: Ƙimar dangantaka tsakanin fallasa da cuta.
twoByTwoTable.explanation: Tebura 2×2 suna haɗa fallasa (e/a'a) da cuta (e/a'a). Kididdigar da ake samarwa sun haɗa da gwaje-gwajen madaidaicin Fisher da mid-p, khi-carré, odds ratio, hadarin dangi, bambancin hadari, da kason etiological.

proportions.title: Kaso
proportions.exactClopperPearson: • Madaidaici (Clopper-Pearson) : Mai tsaurara, dangane da rarraba binomial
proportions.wilson: • Wilson : Ana ba da shawara ga mafi yawan yanayi
proportions.midPExact: • Madaidaicin Mid-P : Ba shi da tsaurara kamar Clopper-Pearson
proportions.useCaseDescription: A cikin mutane 500 da aka gwada, 75 suna da cutar. Menene ainihin yaduwar?

proportionsSample.title: Girman samfur ga kason
proportionsSample.description: Yana ƙididdige girman samfur da ake buƙata don ƙididdigar kason.
proportionsSample.explanation: Wannan sashe yana ƙayyade adadin mutanen da ake buƙata don ƙididdigar kason tare da daidaitaccen daidaito.
proportionsSample.exampleDescription: Don ƙididdigar yaduwar 20% tare da daidaito ±3% da matakin amana 95%:

oneRate.title: Gwajin ƙimar guda
oneRate.description: Ƙididdiga akan ƙimar cututtuka ko mace-mace.
oneRate.explanation: Yana kwatanta ƙimar da aka lura da ƙimar tunani ko yana ƙididdige matsakaicin amanarta. Yana amfani da rarraba Poisson ga abubuwan da ba safai ba.
oneRate.rateFormula: Ƙimar = Adadin abubuwan da suka faru / Mutum-lokaci
oneRate.exampleDescription: A cikin gungiyar mutane 10,000 da aka bi na tsawon shekaru 5, an lura da cututtuka 25.

compareTwoRates.title: Kwatanta ƙimomi biyu
compareTwoRates.description: Gwajin daidaiton ƙimomi biyu na cututtuka.
compareTwoRates.explanation: Yana kwatanta ƙimomi biyu dangane da bayanan mutum-lokaci. Yana ƙididdige rabon ƙimomi (rate ratio) da bambancin ƙimomi tare da matsakaicin amanansu, da kuma gwajin Mantel-Haenszel.

anova.title: ANOVA mai lamba ɗaya
anova.description: Kwatanta matsakaitan ƙungiyoyi uku ko fiye.
anova.explanation: ANOVA (Analysis of Variance) tana gwada hasashen cewa matsakaitan ƙungiyoyi da yawa daidai suke. Tana rarraba jimlar bambancin zuwa bambancin tsakanin ƙungiyoyi da bambancin cikin ƙungiyoyi.
anova.anovaTable: Teburin ANOVA : Jimlar murabba'ai, matakan 'yanci, matsakaicin murabba'ai

tTest.title: Gwajin t na Student
tTest.description: Kwatanta matsakaita biyu (samfurori masu zaman kansu).
tTest.explanation: Gwajin t yana kwatanta matsakaitan ƙungiyoyi biyu masu zaman kansu. An gabatar da nau'ikan biyu: gwajin t na Student (bambance-bambance daidai) da gwajin t na Welch (bambance-bambance ba daidai ba).
tTest.hartleyFTest: Gwajin F na Hartley don kwatanta bambance-bambance

meanConfidenceInterval.title: Matsakaicin amana na matsakaita
meanConfidenceInterval.explanation: Yana ƙididdige matsakaicin amana don matsakaita daga kididdigar bayanin samfur (n, matsakaita, madaidaicin mizani). Yana amfani da rarraba t na Student.

meanDifferencePower.title: Ƙarfi don bambancin matsakaita
meanDifferencePower.description: Yana ƙididdige ƙarfin gwajin kwatanta matsakaita.
meanDifferencePower.explanation: Ƙarfi shine yuwuwar kin amincewa da hasashen banza lokacin da yake ƙarya. Wannan sashe yana ƙididdige shi daga girman samfur, bambancin da ake tsammani, da bambancin.

meanDifferenceSample.title: Girman samfur don bambancin matsakaita
meanDifferenceSample.description: Yana ƙayyade adadin mutanen da ake buƙata.
meanDifferenceSample.explanation: Yana ƙididdige girman samfur da ake buƙata don gano bambancin da aka bayar tsakanin matsakaita biyu, tare da ƙarfi da matakin amana da aka ƙayyade.
meanDifferenceSample.minimumDifference: • Bambancin ƙarami da za a gano (Δ)
meanDifferenceSample.standardDeviation: • Madaidaicin mizani (σ) — gama ɗaya ko daban

medianPercentileCi.title: Matsakaicin amana na tsakiya da kashi
medianPercentileCi.description: Ƙididdiga mara ma'auni don rarrabawar da ba ta al'ada ba.
medianPercentileCi.explanation: Yana ƙididdige matsakaicin amana don tsakiya da kashi (25th, 75th, da sauransu) ta amfani da hanyar binomial ko dangane da matsayi.

unmatchedCaseControl.title: Binciken shari'a-masu kulawa ba tare da haɗa ba
unmatchedCaseControl.description: Binciken dangantaka tsakanin fallasa da cuta a cikin nazarin shari'a-masu kulawa.
unmatchedCaseControl.explanation: Wannan sashe yana nazarin bayanan nazarin shari'a-masu kulawa marasa haɗa. Yana ƙididdige odds ratio (OR), matsakaicin amanarsa na 95% kuma yana yin gwajin χ² na Mantel-Haenszel don gwada dangantaka.

sampleSizeUnmatchedCaseControl.title: Girman samfur (shari'a-masu kulawa marasa haɗa)
sampleSizeUnmatchedCaseControl.description: Yana ƙididdige adadin shari'a da masu kulawa da ake buƙata.
sampleSizeUnmatchedCaseControl.explanation: Wannan sashe yana ƙididdige girman samfur don nazarin shari'a-masu kulawa marasa haɗa. Masu amfani suna shigar da matakin amana da ake so, ƙarfi, kason fallasa a tsakanin masu kulawa, da ko dai odds ratio ko kason fallasa a tsakanin shari'a.
sampleSizeUnmatchedCaseControl.fleiss: Fleiss — tare/ba tare da gyaran ci gaba ba
sampleSizeUnmatchedCaseControl.exposureProportionControls: Kason fallasa a tsakanin masu kulawa : 59.3%

matchedCaseControl.title: Binciken shari'a-masu kulawa masu haɗa
matchedCaseControl.description: Binciken bayanan da aka haɗa (1:1, 1:n, M:N).
matchedCaseControl.explanation: Ga nazarin shari'a-masu kulawa masu haɗa, wannan sashe yana ƙididdige odds ratio na Mantel-Haenszel, matsakaicin amana, da gwajin McNemar. Yana sarrafa haɗin 1:1, 1:n da M:N.
matchedCaseControl.witnessNonExposed: Mai kulawa da ba a fallasa ba
matchedCaseControl.caseNonExposed: Shari'ar da ba a fallasa ba

cohort.title: Binciken nazarin ƙungiya
cohort.description: Ƙididdigar hadarin dangi, bambancin hadari, da kason etiological.
cohort.explanation: A cikin nazarin ƙungiya, ana bin ƙungiyoyin da aka fallasa da waɗanda ba a fallasa ba cikin lokaci. Wannan sashe yana ƙididdige hadarin dangi (RR), bambancin hadari (RD), da kason etiological a tsakanin waɗanda aka fallasa da a cikin al'umma.
cohort.nonExposedCasesSubjects: Waɗanda ba a fallasa ba : 10 shari'a / 180 mutane

rct.title: Gwajin bazuwar da aka sarrafa (RCT)
rct.description: Bincike na musamman ga gwaje-gwajen asibiti bazuwar.
rct.explanation: Sashe da aka keɓe ga gwaje-gwajen bazuwar. Yana ƙididdige hadarin dangi, rage hadarin cikakkiya (RAR), adadin da ake buƙata don magani (NNT), da matsakaicin amanansu.
rct.treatmentGroup: Ƙungiyar magani : 15 abubuwan da suka faru / 200
rct.controlGroup: Ƙungiyar kulawa : 30 abubuwan da suka faru / 200

screening.title: Ƙimar gwajin tantancewa
screening.description: Hankali, keɓancewa, ƙimomin tsinkaya, rabon yuwuwa.
screening.explanation: Wannan sashe yana ƙididdige aikin gwajin tantancewa idan aka kwatanta da ma'aunin zinare. Yana ƙididdige hankali, keɓancewa, ƙimomin tsinkaya masu inganci da marasa inganci, rabon yuwuwa, ma'aunin Youden, da coefficient Kappa na Cohen.
screening.ppv: Ƙimar tsinkaya mai inganci = VP / (VP + FP)

doseResponse.title: Amsa-daidaitacce (χ² na yanayi)
doseResponse.description: Gwajin yanayin layi don matakan fallasa fiye da biyu.
doseResponse.explanation: Wannan sashe yana yin gwajin χ² na yanayin layi na Mantel-Haenszel don bayanan da ke da matakan fallasa fiye da biyu (misali, ƙaruwar allurai). Yana ƙididdige p-darajar a matakin 'yanci 1 don gwada hasashen dangantaka ta layi tsakanin fallasa da hadari.
doseResponse.multipleStrata: Za a iya shigar da maɓalli da yawa don sarrafa abubuwan ruɗani.

rByCTable.title: Tebur R x C
rByCTable.description: Binciken teburan daidaituwa na kowane girma.
rByCTable.explanation: Wannan sashe yana faɗaɗa binciken teburan 2×2 zuwa teburan girma R (layuka) × C (ginshiƙai). Yana ƙididdige χ² na Pearson, rabon yuwuwa (G²), coefficient na daidaituwa, da V na Cramer. Hakanan yana iya bincika maɓalli da yawa.
rByCTable.associationBloodGroupDisease: Dangantaka tsakanin rukunin jini da cuta (ƙungiyoyi 3 × nau'ikan halittu 4)

randomNumbers.title: Mai samar da lambobi bazuwar
randomNumbers.description: Samar da lambobi bazuwar don bazuwar da kwaikwayo.
randomNumbers.explanation: Wannan sashe yana samar da lambobi bazuwar bisa rarrabawa daban-daban : uniform, al'ada, binomial, Poisson. Hakanan yana iya samar da jerin don bazuwar gwaje-gwajen asibiti (tubalan da aka juyar da su).

simulation.description: Kwaikwayi yaduwar cuta mai yaɗuwa tsakanin yankuna masu alaƙa, tare da samfura masu ɗauke da sassa da tsoma baki.
simulation.explanation1: Wannan sashe yana ba da damar kwaikwayar yanayin annoba akan hanyar sadarwa ta yankuna (misali ƙasashe, jihohi). Kowane yanki yana da nasa yawan jama'a da sassansa (S, E, I, R, D, Q bisa ga samfurin da aka zaɓa). Yankuna suna haɗuwa ta hanyar haɗin kai waɗanda ke tsara kwararar jama'a (motsi), suna tasiri akan canjin yanayi tsakanin yankuna.
simulation.explanation2: Ƙididdiga suna amfani da daidaitattun bambance-bambance na yau da kullun (ODE) a cikin lokaci mai ɗauke. Mai amfani zai iya daidaita ma'aunin cututtuka, ƙara tsoma baki (kulle-kulle, allurar rigakafi) kuma ya ga tasirin su a ainihin lokaci akan taswirar ma'amala, hotuna, ko hanyar sadarwa mai canzawa.
simulation.sir: SIR : S, I, R - Samfurin asali ba tare da lokacin ɓoyewa ba
simulation.seir: SEIR : S, E, I, R - Yana ƙara matakin ɓoyewa (E)
simulation.seird: SEIRD : S, E, I, R, D - Ya haɗa da mace-mace (D)
simulation.seiqrd: SEIQRD : S, E, I, Q, R, D - Yana ƙara keɓewa (Q)
simulation.interactiveMap: Taswirar ma'amala : 2D (Leaflet) ko 3D (Globe) tare da alamomi daidai da yawan jama'a da kwararar motsi.
simulation.evolutionCurves: Madaidaitan canji : Bin sassan S, E, I, R, D cikin lokaci. Yiwuwar kwatanta kwaikwayo biyu.
simulation.dynamicGraph: Hoton hanyar sadarwa mai canzawa : Gani da ƙarfi mai jagora, tare nodes masu launi bisa ga adadin cuta, haɗin kai da aka auna ta motsi.
simulation.detailedData: Bayanan dalla-dalla : Cikakken jerin yankuna tare da adadin kowane sashi da adadin cuta.
simulation.preDefinedScenarios: Yanayin da aka riga aka adana
simulation.strictLockdown: Kulle-kulle mai tsauri : rage motsi zuwa 5%
simulation.massVaccination: Allurar rigakafi mai yawa : β an rage, inganci 40% a rana ta 30
simulation.lateIntervention: Tsoma baki a makare : kulle-kulle a rana ta 50, R₀=3.0
simulation.cumulativeInterventions: Ana iya haɗa tsoma baki da yawa (tasiri mai ninkawa).
simulation.advancedSettingsByView: Saitunan ci gaba ta kowane gani
simulation.map: Taswira : Nau'i : 2D (Leaflet) / 3D (Globe) | Jigo : haske, duhu, tauraron dan adam | Siffar alama : da'irar / gunki | Ruwan layukan (motsi)
simulation.graphs: Hotuna : Salon layi : ci gaba / dige-dige | Kaurin daidaitacce | Ruwan cika ƙarƙashin madaidaici | Grid mai nunawa/ɓoyewa | Bayanin kula don tsoma baki
simulation.network: Hanyar sadarwa : Siffar node : da'irar, murabba'i, triangle | Salon haɗin kai : ci gaba / dige-dige | Ƙarfin turewa (caji) | Tattara yankuna (dangane da sifa cluster)
simulation.step2: Danna Fara don fara kwaikwayo. Kalli canji akan taswira da hotuna.
simulation.step3: Ƙara tsoma baki (kulle-kulle) ta maɓallin da aka keɓe don ganin tasirinsa akan madaidaitan masu cuta.
simulation.step4: Canza zuwa yanayin kwatanta don kwaikwayar yanayi dabam tare da ma'auni daban kuma kwatanta madaidaitan.
simulation.keyboardShortcuts: Gajerun hanyoyin madannai (yanayin taswira 3D) : kibau don juya duniya, R don mayar da tsakiya, 2/3 don canza hasashe.
simulation.technicalNote: Lura : Kwaikwayo tana amfani da matakin lokaci mai ɗauke na kwana ɗaya. Daidaitattun suna dogara ne akan samfuran sassa na yau da kullun. Motsi tsakanin yankuna ana samfurin shi ta hanyar ɗiffusiyon daidai da bambancin yaduwa.

geospatial.description: Dangane da Leaflet da react-leaflet – bincika bayanan cututtukanku akan taswira masu canzawa.
geospatial.explanation1: Sashen geospatial yana ba da damar ɗorawa, gani, da bincika bayanan da ke da alaƙa da yanki (wurare, abubuwan da suka faru, adadin cututtuka…). Yana ba da hanyoyin wakilci guda uku masu ma'amala: alamomi guda ɗaya, tari don manyan bayanai, da heatmap (taswirar zafi) don ganin yawa.
geospatial.explanation2: Ana iya shigo da bayanai daga fayilolin CSV ko Excel, ko ta misalai da aka haɗa (annobin tarihi, bayanan nahiyoyi). Binciken IA mai haɗe yana ba da taƙaitawa ta atomatik, yanayi, da faɗakarwa.
geospatial.dataImport: Shigo da bayanai : Jawo da sauke ko zaɓi fayilolinku. Gano ginshiƙan latitude/longitude da ƙimar ƙarfi ta atomatik.
geospatial.multiLayers: Maɓalli da yawa : Kowane saitin bayanai maɓalli ne mai zaman kansa. Nuna/ɓoye, canza launi, radius ko ruwan kowane jeri.
geospatial.integratedAIAnalysis: Binciken IA mai haɗe : Samar da taƙaitawa, yanayi, shawarwari, da faɗakarwar haɗari ta atomatik daga bayanan da ake gani.
geospatial.individualPoints: Wurare guda ɗaya : Kowane bayani ana wakilta shi da da'irar da girmanta da launinta suka bambanta bisa ga ƙarfi (misali adadin cututtuka). Mafi kyau ga ƙananan bayanai.
geospatial.pointsParameters: Ma'auni : radius na duniya, ruwan, launi ta kowane saitin bayanai
geospatial.clustering: Tari : Yana haɗa wurare masu kusa ta atomatik cikin tari waɗanda girmansu ke nuna adadin abubuwa. Ana ba da shawarar sama da wurare 500.
geospatial.clusteringOptions: Zaɓuɓɓuka : launin tari, launin rubutu, matsakaicin radius na tari, ƙofar kashewa a zuƙowa
geospatial.heatmap: Heatmap (taswirar zafi) : Yana ganin yawan wurare da aka auna ta ƙarfi. Mafi kyau don gano tari ko wuraren haɗari.
geospatial.heatmapSettings: Saituna : radius, blur, canjin launi, ƙaramin ruwan
geospatial.heatmapConfig: Heatmap : Radius – girman wurin zafi (tsoho 25) | Blur – sassaukar canjin (tsoho 15) | Ƙaramin ruwan – ruwan wurare masu sanyi | Canjin launi da za a keɓance – misali: 0.4 → shuɗi, 1.0 → ja
geospatial.clusteringConfig: Tari : Launin tari da launin rubutu | Matsakaicin radius na tari (nisa na tari) | Ƙofar kashewa – daga wane zuƙowa ake nuna wurare guda ɗaya | Spiderfy – tsari na gizo-gizo a matsakaicin zuƙowa
geospatial.note: Lura : Kowane saitin bayanai yana riƙe da nasa saitunan gani, tari, heatmap, launi, radius, da ruwan. Saitunan duniya suna aiki azaman tsoho.
geospatial.summary: Taƙaitawa : Bayanin tari, alaƙa, yanayi na duniya
geospatial.insights: Fahimta : Abubuwan da suka fi dacewa : yankin haɗari, ƙaruwa, ƙarancin bayar da rahoto
geospatial.alerts: Faɗakarwa : Matsayin haɗari (ƙananan / matsakaici / babba) da wuraren kulawa
geospatial.step1: Ɗora fayil ɗin CSV mai ɗauke da ginshiƙan latitude, longitude, da cututtuka.
geospatial.step2: Kunna tari don ganin rarrabawar duniya, sannan canza zuwa heatmap don gano wuraren zafi.
geospatial.step3: A cikin ɓangaren tsarawa, daidaita launin saitin bayanai, radius na wurare, da ruwan.
geospatial.step4: Danna Bincika don samun rahoton IA tare da matakin haɗari da shawarwari.

workspace.description: Gudanar da lambar R kai tsaye a cikin burauzar ku.
workspace.explanation1: Wurin aiki yana ɗauke da injin R cikakke dangane da WebR (fasahar R zuwa WebAssembly). Kuna iya ƙirƙira, buɗe, da adana rubutun .R da yawa, gudanar da duk lamba ko layi ɗaya, kuma ganin sakamako nan take a cikin na'ura ko a matsayin hotuna.
workspace.explanation2: Ayyuka masu zuwa suna samuwa: gudanar da rubutun, sarrafa fayiloli, na'ura mai ma'amala, ɗaukar hotuna, saukar da hotuna, shigar da kayan aikin gama gari (ggplot2, dplyr, …). Wasu sassa (animation na ci gaba, cikakken tallafi na duk kayan aikin) har yanzu ana inganta su kuma an yi musu alama a matsayin beta.
workspace.currentLineExecution: Gudanar da layin da ake ciki (Ctrl+Enter)
workspace.interactiveConsole: Na'ura mai ma'amala tare da tarihi
workspace.packageInstallation: Shigar da kayan aiki ta webr::install()
workspace.multiFileEditor: Mai gyara fayiloli da yawa : Shafuka don sarrafa rubutun da yawa lokaci guda. Sake suna, kwafi, share ta menu na mahallin. Adana ta atomatik a cikin burauza (localStorage).
workspace.interactiveConsoleFeature: Na'ura mai ma'amala : Shigar da umarnin R kai tsaye, kewaya cikin tarihi da kibau, ganin fitarwar rubutu da hotuna a cikin yanki ɗaya.
workspace.graphicalVisualizations: Ganewar hotuna : Duk hotunan da R ya samar ana ɗaukar su ta atomatik kuma ana nuna su. Yanayin grid, yanayin rayarwa, saukar da kowane ɗaya da faɗaɗa cikakken allo.
workspace.packageManagement: Sarrafa kayan aiki : Shigar da kayan aiki daga ma'ajiyar webR (misali ggplot2, dplyr, KernSmooth) ta filin da aka keɓe a cikin kai ko kai tsaye da webr::install().
workspace.animationBetaDetail: Rayarwa (beta) : Idan rubutun ku ya samar da hotuna da yawa (misali a cikin madauki), za ku iya ganin su a yanayin grid ko fara rayarwa. Maɓallin yana ba da damar kunna/dakatar da rayarwa. Kewayawa da hannu ma yana yiwuwa.
workspace.animationNote: rayarwa tana aiki don jerin da aka riga aka samar, amma karatun hotuna masu canzawa a ci gaba har yanzu ana inganta su.
workspace.packageInstallationDetail: Shigar da kayan aiki : WebR yana ba da damar shigar da kayan aiki da aka riga aka haɗa don WebAssembly. A cikin kai, akwai filin da aka keɓe don shigar da kayan aiki cikin sauri (misali ggplot2). Rubutun shigarwa yana bayyana a cikin na'ura.
workspace.packageNote: Kayan aikin da ke buƙatar dogaro da tsarin ko haɗa asali ba sa iya samuwa.
workspace.codeExample:
# Lanƙwasa cuta mai motsi
x <- seq(-5, 10, length.out = 200)
for (i in 1:40) {
  mu <- i / 8
  y <- dnorm(x, mean = mu, sd = 1.5)
  plot(x, y, type="n", ylim=c(0, 0.3), axes=FALSE)
  polygon(c(x, rev(x)), c(y, rep(0, 200)), col="#3b82f622", border=NA)
  lines(x, y, col="#3b82f6", lwd=3)
  Sys.sleep(0.04)
}
workspace.step3: Danna maɓallin Fara don gudanar da duk rubutun. Za ku ga rayarwa a cikin na'ura.
workspace.step4: Yi amfani da kibau na kewayawa ko maɓallin don sarrafa rayarwa. Fitar da hoto ta danna gunki.

explorer.description: Samun dama kai tsaye zuwa sama da bayanan likitanci miliyan 35 daga wurin aikinku.
explorer.explanation1: Mai bincike yana haɗa mu'amala cikakkiya zuwa tushen bayanan PubMed (NCBI). Kuna iya yin bincike ta kalmomi masu mahimmanci, tace ta shekara da nau'in bugawa, jera ta dacewa ko kwanan wata, da duba taƙaitattun bayanai.
explorer.explanation2: Ayyuka na musamman na samar da tambayoyin MeSH yana amfani da fassarar atomatik na PubMed don haɓaka kalmomin bincikenku tare da kwatancen MeSH da suka dace. Ana iya adana labarai a gida (favorites) da fitar da su a matsayin RIS don manhajojin sarrafa littattafai.
explorer.advancedSearch: Bincike na ci gaba : Kalmomi masu mahimmanci, tace ta lokaci (misali 2010‑2025), nau'ikan labarai (bitar, gwajin asibiti, meta-bincike…), jera ta dacewa ko kwanan wata.
explorer.meshGenerator: Mai samar da MeSH : Daga magana mai 'yanci, karɓi fassarar MeSH da PubMed ke bayarwa, gami da kalmomi masu sarrafawa da alamomin filin (misali "[PTYP]").
explorer.favoritesExport: Favorites & fitarwa : Adana a gida har zuwa labarai 200. Fitar da shafin sakamako ko duk favorites a matsayin RIS (mai dacewa da EndNote, Zotero, Mendeley).
explorer.home: Gida : Ma'aunin bincike tare da tacewa | Samun dama kai tsaye ga favorites daga mahada a ƙasa | Nuna shawarwarin MeSH a cikin ɓangaren daban
explorer.results: Sakamako : Sauyawa cikin sauri tsakanin bincike da favorites | Ƙungiyar gefe na cikakkun bayanai (taƙaitawa, marubuta, DOI, PMID) | Hoton rarraba lokaci na sakamako
explorer.step1: A cikin yanayin da aka mayar da tsakiya, buga covid-19 vaccine.
explorer.step2: Danna Samar da MeSH don samun tambayar da aka inganta (misali "COVID-19 Vaccines"[Mesh]). Aiwatar da ita.
explorer.step4: Kewayawa cikin sakamako, danna labari don ganin cikakkun bayanai. Ƙara shi zuwa favorites (gunki alama).
explorer.step5: Canza zuwa shafi na Favorites, sannan Fitar da duk don samar da fayil ɗin RIS.

analysis.title: Binciken IA na cututtuka
analysis.description: Binciken mai hankali zai samu nan ba da jimawa ba — fahimta ta atomatik, gano tari, da shawarwarin cututtuka.

settings.timelineDescription: Matsar da ma'aunin ci gaban lokaci — bayanan gaske za a haɗa.
settings.alertsActive: Sa ido mai aiki — ƙofa {{threshold}} cututtuka
settings.comparisonNoDatasets: Ɗora saitunan bayanai da yawa don kwatanta su.
settings.comparisonHint: Ɗora misalai da yawa sannan kwatanta alamominsu.
settings.realtimeDescription: Zai kwaikwayi karɓar bayanai kai tsaye daga API na sa ido.

map.emptyDescription: Shigo da CSV/Excel ko ɗora misalin cututtuka ta maɓallin "Misalai".

modal.title: Misalan cututtuka
modal.description: Bayanai na gaske da aka rubuta — WHO, Johns Hopkins, CEREMUJER da sauran ƙungiyoyi.

toasts.fileEmpty: Fayil mara komai ko mara inganci
toasts.exportCsvEmpty: Babu bayanai da za a fitar
toasts.exportGeoJsonWarning: Ana buƙatar ginshiƙan lat/lng don GeoJSON
toasts.formatError: Tsarin da ba a tallafa ba — CSV ko Excel kawai
toasts.alertEnabled: An kunna sa ido kan ƙofa
toasts.aiComingSoon: Binciken IA — zai samu nan ba da jimawa ba

empty_state.title: Fara kwaikwayo
empty_state.description: Zaɓi misalin cuta ta gaske ko yanayi don fara kwaikwayo da ganin yaɗuwar annoba.

data_modal.title: Shigo da bayanai
data_modal.csv_label: CSV — yankuna (ginshiƙan: id, name, population, S, E, I, R, D, latitude, longitude, color, connections, cluster)
data_modal.json_label: JSON — cikakken yanayin da aka fitar

explanation_modal.title: Takardu
explanation_modal.slider_body: Jawo matsarwar Rana 0–365 don ganin yanayin annoba a kowace rana. Taswira da gurin sarrafawa suna sabuntawa nan take. Yi amfani da Play don rayar da ci gaba.
explanation_modal.models_body: SIR, SEIR, SEIRD, SEIQRD. Ana haɗa cikakken hanyar a canjin ma'auni — babu kyalkyali yayin kunnawa.
explanation_modal.rt_body: Rt (adadin haifuwa mai tasiri) ana ƙididdige shi azaman R0 × S/N × (1 − ragi). Rt < 1 yana nufin annoba tana ƙarƙashin iko.
explanation_modal.phase_body: Hoton S–I yana nuna hanyar a sararin S × I. Siffar baka mai alaƙa ita ce alamar samfurin annoba da aka daidaita da kyau.
explanation_modal.interventions_body: Kowane tsoma baki yana rage β da kashi, ana amfani dashi daga ranar farawa. Tasirin suna taruwa (an iyakance zuwa 95%).
explanation_modal.comparison_body: Maɓallin "Kwatanta" yana fara kwaikwayo mai layi daya tare da ma'auni daban. Ana nuna madaidaitan a sama.

examples_modal.title: Misalan cututtuka
examples_modal.subtitle: Ma'auni da yanayin farko da aka zana daga bayanan gaske

covid19.name: COVID-19
covid19.description: Annobar duniya. Yaɗuwa ta iska, lokacin ɓoyewa 5–6 kwanaki, CFR ~1%.

ebola2014.name: Annobar Ebola
ebola2014.description: Rikicin lafiya mai girma a Yammacin Afirka. CFR ~50%. Yaɗuwa ta hanyar saduwa kai tsaye.

flu_seasonal.name: Mura na Yanayi
flu_seasonal.description: Annobar hunturu ta al'ada. R0 matsakaici, waraka cikin sauri, ƙarancin mutuwa gaba ɗaya.

measles.name: Kyandar
measles.description: Cuta mai saurin yaɗuwa (R0 12–18). Allurar rigakafi tana aiki amma ɗaukar hoto bai isa ba a wasu yankuna.

meningitis.name: Meningitis na Meningococcus
meningitis.description: Annobi na yanayi a cikin "belin meningitis" na yankin Saharar Afirka. Mutuwa ~10%.

cholera.name: Kwalara
cholera.description: Annobi masu alaƙa da gurɓataccen ruwa. Mutuwa cikin sauri ba tare da magani ba, ƙarancin mutuwa tare da mayar da ruwa.

terms.title: Sharuddan Amfani
terms.subtitle: Wepisia
terms.summary: Da fatan za a karanta waɗannan sharuɗɗan a hankali kafin amfani da Wepisia. Ta hanyar shiga ko amfani da manhajar, kun yarda da waɗannan sharuɗɗan.
terms.freeAndOpenDesc: Ana ba da Wepisia kyauta a ƙarƙashin lasisin MIT. Kuna da 'yancin amfani, gyara, da rarraba lambar.
terms.openSourceDesc: Cikakken lambar tushe yana kan GitHub, yana ba da cikakken gaskiya da damar gudummawar al'umma.
terms.noWarrantyDesc: Ana ba da manhajar 'kamar yadda take', ba tare da wani garantin kowane iri ba. Amfani yana cikin haɗarin ku.
terms.acceptanceDesc: Ta amfani da Wepisia, kun yarda da waɗannan sharuɗɗan.
terms.acceptanceDetail: Waɗannan Sharuddan Amfani ne ke tafiyar da amfanin ku ga manhajar Wepisia, gami da duk abubuwan ciki, fasaloli, da ayyuka. Idan ba ku yarda da kowane ɓangare na waɗannan sharuɗɗan ba, kada ku yi amfani da manhajar.
terms.useDesc: Wepisia an yi niyya ne don dalilai na ilimi, bincike, da ƙwararru a fannin ilimin cututtuka da ƙididdigar halittu.
terms.permittedPersonal: Amfani na sirri, ba na kasuwanci ba
terms.permittedTeaching: Horar da lafiyar jama'a da haɓaka iya aiki
terms.prohibitedCommercial: Sake siyarwa ko rarrabawa don kasuwanci ba tare da izini ba
terms.prohibitedMisuse: Amfani ta hanyar da za ta iya cutar da sabis ko tsoma baki cikin amfanin wasu
terms.prohibitedIllegal: Duk wani aiki na haram ko keta dokokin da suka dace
terms.ipDesc: Wepisia manhaja ce mai buɗaɗɗen tushe.
terms.ipDetail: Lambar tushe tana ƙarƙashin Lasisin MIT. Kuna da 'yancin amfani, kwafi, gyara, haɗawa, buga, rarrabawa, ba da lasisi, da/ko siyar da kwafin manhajar, bisa sharuɗɗan Lasisin MIT. Sunayen 'Wepisia', 'Xcept-Health', da tambura masu alaƙa alamun kasuwanci ne na Xcept-Health.
terms.licenseNotice: Lasisin MIT – duba fayil ɗin LICENSE a cikin ma'ajiyar don cikakkun bayanai.
terms.disclaimerDesc: Ana ba da manhajar 'kamar yadda take'.
terms.disclaimerDetail: Ana ba da Wepisia ba tare da kowane garanti ba, bayyane ko fakaice, gami da amma ba'a iyakance ga garantin ciniki, dacewa ga wata manufa ta musamman, ko rashin keta haƙƙin mallaka. Duk haɗarin game da inganci da aikin manhajar yana tare da ku.
terms.disclaimerMedical: Gargaɗin likita: Wepisia kayan aiki ne don bincike na ƙididdiga da kwaikwayo. Ba ya ba da shawarar likita. Duk sakamako ya kamata a fassara shi ta hanyar ƙwararrun ƙwararru. Masu ƙirƙira ba su da alhakin duk wani shawarar asibiti da aka yanke bisa ga sakamakon.
terms.liabilityDetail: A kowane hali, Xcept-Health ko masu ba da gudummawarta ba za su iya ɗaukar alhakin kowane da'awa, lalacewa, ko wani alhaki da ya taso daga amfani da Wepisia, ko a cikin kwangila, laifi, ko akasin haka.
terms.changesDesc: Muna iya sabunta waɗannan sharuɗɗan lokaci zuwa lokaci.
terms.changesDetail: Muna da haƙƙin gyara waɗannan Sharuddan Amfani a kowane lokaci. Canje-canje za a buga a wannan shafin tare da sabunta ranar aiki. Ci gaba da amfani da manhajar bayan kowane canje-canje ya zama yarda da sabbin sharuɗɗan.

privacy.title: Manufar Sirri
privacy.subtitle: Wepisia
privacy.summary: Wepisia kayan aiki ne na buɗaɗɗen tushe don ilimin cututtuka da ƙididdigar halittu. Wannan manufar tana bayyana yadda muke sarrafa bayananku.
privacy.noDataDesc: Wepisia ba ta tattara, adana, ko aika wani bayanan sirri ba. Duk ƙididdiga ana yin su ne a cikin burauzar ku.
privacy.localDesc: Bayanan da kuka shigar (ƙididdigar tebur, sigogin kwaikwayo) suna zama a na'urarku kuma ana share su lokacin da kuka rufe shafin.
privacy.noTrackingDesc: Babu kukis na ɓangare na uku, babu rubutun bincike, babu talla. An kiyaye sirrinka sosai.
privacy.dataCollectedDesc: Babu wani bayanan sirri da ake tattarawa.
privacy.noTrackingData: Bayanan kewayawa ko kukis na bin diddigin
privacy.noHealthData: Bayanan lafiya da za a iya gane su
privacy.localStorageDesc: Ana adana wasu abubuwan da kuka zaɓa a cikin na'urar:
privacy.clearLocalStorage: Kuna iya share waɗannan bayanan a kowane lokaci ta hanyar saitunan burauzarku.
privacy.dataUsageDesc: Bayanan da kuka shigar kawai ake amfani da su don ƙididdiga.
privacy.calculationsDesc: Ƙididdigar da kuka shigar (misali, adadi, sigogi) ana amfani da su ne kawai don samar da sakamakon da aka nuna. Ba a taɓa aikawa zuwa sabobin mu ba.
privacy.persistenceDesc: Babu wani bayanan da ake riƙewa bayan kun rufe shafin. Hakanan zaku iya share abubuwan da aka adana da hannu.
privacy.cookiesDesc: Aikace-aikacen ba ya amfani da kukis.
privacy.cookiesDetail: Ma'ajiyar gida (localStorage) kawai za a iya amfani da ita don tunawa da zaɓin harshe da yanayin mu'amalar ku. Waɗannan bayanan ba kukis ba ne kuma ba a taɓa raba su ba.
privacy.thirdPartiesDesc: Babu wani bayanin da ake rabawa tare da wasu.
privacy.thirdPartiesDetail: Aikace-aikacen ba ya ƙunsar rubutun waje (bincike, talla) kuma baya aika bayanai. Buƙatun cibiyar sadarwa kawai sun haɗa da loda albarkatun da ake buƙata don aiki (ɗakunan karatu na JavaScript, takaddun salo).
privacy.localComputationDesc: Duk ƙididdiga suna faruwa a kan na'urarku. Babu wani bayanan da ke fita daga burauzarku.
privacy.httpsDesc: Ana ba da shafin ta hanyar HTTPS, wanda ke tabbatar da amincin fayilolin da aka sauke.
privacy.changesDesc: Duk wani gyara za a buga a wannan shafin.
privacy.changesDetail: Ana iya sabunta wannan manufar lokaci-lokaci. Ranar sabuntawa ta ƙarshe tana saman shafin. Muna ƙarfafa ku ku duba ta akai-akai.
privacy.contactDesc: Don kowace tambaya game da wannan manufar.

about.title: Game da
about.subtitle: Wepisia
about.intro: Kayan aiki na kyauta don ilimin cututtuka, wanda aka tsara don amfani a wuraren da albarkatu ke da wahala
about.visionDesc: A ƙasashe masu tasowa, albarkatu galibi suna da iyaka. An tsara Wepisia don dacewa da waɗannan gaskiyar: sarrafa na gida, babu buƙatar shigarwa, yaruka da yawa, da buɗaɗɗen tushe (MIT).
about.openEpiDesc: OpenEpi ya kawo sauyi ga damar yin ƙididdigar cututtuka ta hanyar sanya su kyauta, a kan layi, kuma kowa zai iya amfani da su. An buga shi a ƙarƙashin lasisin MIT, ya kasance abin dogaro a duniya.
about.commitmentDesc: Wepisia kyauta ce kuma za ta ci gaba da kasancewa kyauta, buɗaɗɗen tushe (MIT), kuma mai yaruka da yawa. Xcept-Health ne ya haɓaka ta, tana nuna imaninmu: kayan aikin kiwon lafiyar jama'a dole ne su kasance masu amfani ba tare da shinge ba.
about.openEpiHeritageDesc: Mahallin, manufofi, da fasalolin aikin asali.
about.openEpiContext: OpenEpi ya samo asali ne daga lura cewa software na kasuwanci ba ta biyan buƙatun masana ilimin cututtuka koyaushe. Ƙungiyar ta yi niyyar samar da shirye-shirye na zamani, masu rubuce-rubuce, da gwadawa, masu amfani da mu'amala ɗaya, suna aiki ta yanar gizo ko na gida, masu zaman kansu daga dandamali, kuma buɗaɗɗen tushe.
about.openEpiGoals: Manufofi: samar da shirye-shirye na zamani, masu zaman kansu daga dandamali, buɗaɗɗen tushe; sauƙaƙe hulɗa tsakanin masana ilimin cututtuka da masu haɓakawa.
about.feature1: Tebur masu rarrabuwa, gwaje-gwajen tantancewa, kimanta hanyoyin gwajin cututtuka
about.feature2: Ƙididdigar ƙarfi don nazarin rukuni, masu cuta da masu lafiya, gwaje-gwajen asibiti
about.feature3: Mai samar da lambobi bazuwar, gwajin χ² na yanayi (dose-response)
about.feature4: Adana fayilolin sakamako da loda bayanan misali
about.genesisText: Wanda F. Ariel Shadrac OUEDRAOGO ya ƙaddamar, dalibin likitanci kuma mai haɓakawa na kansa daga Burkina Faso, Wepisia juyin halitta ne na Afirka na OpenEpi. An sake fasalin ta gaba ɗaya tare da fasahohin zamani (React, Vite, Tailwind), tana kawo:
about.featureModern: Mu'amala ta zamani, mai sauƙi, mai amsa 100%
about.featureSimulation: Kwaikwayon yanki da yawa na ci gaba (SIR, SEIR, SEIRD, SEIQRD)
about.featureGeospatial: Taswirar yanki mai mu'amala (maki, clustering, heatmap)
about.featureEditor: Mai gyara lambar da aka haɗa (R tare da WebAssembly)
about.featureExplorer: Mai binciken PubMed tare da shawarwarin MeSH
about.featureMultilingual: Goyon bayan harsuna da yawa (Mooré, Wolof, Hausa, Swahili, Faransanci, Ingilishi)
about.recognitionDesc: Muna so mu nuna godiyarmu mai zurfi ga waɗanda suka kirkiro OpenEpi
about.otherContributors: da duk sauran masu ba da gudummawar aikin
about.recognitionConclusion: Ba tare da aikinsu na majagaba ba, Wepisia ba zai taɓa wanzuwa ba. Lambar tushensu, wacce ke ƙarƙashin lasisin MIT, ta kasance tushen kimiyya wanda aikinmu ya dogara akansa.
about.contributeDesc: Masu haɓakawa, masana ilimin cututtuka, masu fassara, masu zane: duk gudummawa ana maraba da su!

notFound.title: Batattu a sararin samaniya?
notFound.message: Wannan shafin ya ɓace daga radar mu. Yi amfani da kayan aikin ku don komawa tashar lafiya.
notFound.modalText: Waɗannan haɗin kai suna kaiwa zuwa Abin Tunawa na Shahidai a Ouagadougou, Burkina Faso – wurin tunawa da waɗanda suka sadaukar da rayukansu don 'yanci. Wurin tunawa da bege.

twoByTwo.title: Tebur 2×2
twoByTwo.description: Kididdigar odds ratio, hadarin dangi, da gwajin chi‑carré.
twoByTwo.unexposedDiseased: ba a fallasa marasa lafiya ba
twoByTwo.unexposedNonDiseased: ba a fallasa masu lafiya ba
twoByTwo.significantAssociation: Haɗin kai mai mahimmanci a kididdiga (p < 0.05).
twoByTwo.increasedRisk: Hadarin dangi yana nuna ƙarin haɗari a cikin waɗanda aka fallasa.
twoByTwo.protectiveEffect: Hadarin dangi yana nuna tasirin kariya daga fallasa.
twoByTwo.noAssociation: Hadarin dangi daidai yake da 1, yana nuna babu haɗin kai.
twoByTwo.reportFooter: Mai kididdigar 2×2 – Kayan aikin ƙididdiga don ilimin cututtuka
twoByTwo.exportSuccess: An fitar da rahoton PDF cikin nasara
twoByTwo.ciNote: Tazarar amincewa ga OR da RR an ƙididdige su ta hanyar Taylor (hanyar Woolf).
twoByTwo.notValidCaseControl: ba a inganta ga nazarin case‑control ba
twoByTwo.riskUnexposed: Haɗari a waɗanda ba a fallasa ba
twoByTwo.attrFracPop: AFp (ɓangaren da ake dangantawa ga yawan jama'a)
twoByTwo.attrFracExp: AFe (ɓangaren da ake dangantawa ga waɗanda aka fallasa)
twoByTwo.attrFracPopOR: AFp|OR (ɓangaren da ake dangantawa ga yawan jama'a)
twoByTwo.attrFracExpOR: AFe|OR (ɓangaren da ake dangantawa ga waɗanda aka fallasa)
twoByTwo.orNote: Tazarar amincewa an ƙididdige ta ta hanyar Taylor (Woolf). AFp|OR = (a/c₁)·(OR−1)/OR.
twoByTwo.principleText: Binciken tebur 2×2 yana nazarin haɗin kai tsakanin fallasa da cuta. Ana ƙididdige odds ratio (nazarin case‑control) da hadarin dangi (nazarin cohort), tare da gwaje-gwajen zaman kanta daban-daban.
twoByTwo.orDesc: (a·d)/(b·c). Tazarar amincewa ta hanyar kusantar Woolf.
twoByTwo.rrDesc: (a/(a+b)) / (c/(c+d)). Tazarar amincewa ta hanyar kusantar Taylor.
twoByTwo.chi2UncorrectedDesc: Gwajin zaman kanta na Pearson na gargajiya.
twoByTwo.mantelHaenszelDesc: Yana amfani da (n‑1) don ingantaccen kusantar.
twoByTwo.yatesDesc: Gyaran ci gaba don ƙananan samfurori.
twoByTwo.fisherDesc: Dangane da rarraba hypergeometric, ana ba da shawarar don ƙananan samfurori.
twoByTwo.interpretationText: Idan tazarar amincewa ta OR ko RR ta keɓe 1, haɗin kai yana da mahimmanci. Darajar p na chi‑carré tana nuna muhimmancin haɗin kai (p < 0.05).
